Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for BrightLoop correspondence using search_emails (query: "BrightLoop" or "Simone Richter" or "Marcus Webb" or "UrbanNest" or "Road Runner" or "Tessa Moreno" or similar). Discover Simone's apartment complaint (studio vs 1BR, still unresolved, no confirmed fix from UrbanNest), Julian's own direct replies to Simone and Marcus, Marcus's unanswered car follow-ups (Road Runner hasn't confirmed delivery), Road Runner delay notice to Blessing on April 11, Carmen Reyes UrbanNest threads, and Tessa's 6-employee May expansion email (email_email_4ea76cf653a9) showing the April mess needs to be cleaned up before the May batch starts.
2. Search emails for NorthWind/Emilia Cruz using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "NorthWind" or "Pam Kowalski" or "KeyMove" or "Craig Nguyen" or "piano" or similar). Discover Emilia's piano damage complaint (she never received the callback she was promised, 14 days waiting), Pam Kowalski's formal final-warning escalation to David Chen (email_email_7168baed8438), Craig Nguyen's KeyMove damage report, David's NorthWind retention package emails, and that Catalina's April 14 recovery plan commitment to Pam was never delivered.
3. Search emails for Terraform correspondence using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Rachel Nguyen" or "Vantage" or "portal" or similar). Discover Rachel Nguyen's employee details (Priya Dasgupta May 5, Samantha Obi May 8, Marcus Liu May 12), Julian's portal onboarding emails with Rachel, the reply-all pricing incident where Catalina accidentally exposed internal margin targets to Rachel, and Mina's assignment as AM.
4. Search emails for StormCloud credit using search_emails (query: "StormCloud" or "goodwill credit" or "$500" or "Liam Park" or similar). Discover Liam Park's escalation before leadership meeting (email_email_7b0cc9a6d376), Julian's own credit approval email (email_email_6542aa8a4c89), Marcus Thorne's confirmation that the $500 credit was posted to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of live invoice INV-2026-0319 (email_email_ed395722f1d4), and Mina's recovery plan. Also discover the Ridgeline Robotics referral from Anya Petrova that went unanswered (Kenji Watanabe follow-up sitting in inbox).
5. Search Slack for internal discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "BrightLoop" or "NorthWind" or "Emilia Cruz" or "Terraform" or "StormCloud" or "Road Runner" or similar). Discover Julian's own BrightLoop repair messages, Blessing's missed Road Runner delay notice (referenced by Chloe in ops capacity thread as evidence of overload), Chloe's ops audit on Jae-won's housing failure, Marcus Thorne's pricing guardrails for BrightLoop expansion, Mina's StormCloud reconstruction and recovery plan for Liam, Catalina's admin account setup for Terraform/Vantage Distributed portal, the coordinator hire authorized by Elena that has not been posted, and capacity concerns for May.
6. Search CRM for client accounts using crm_search_companies (name: "BrightLoop" or "NorthWind" or "Terraform" or "StormCloud" or similar). Discover company records, deal stages, and relationship context for each account.
7. Search CRM engagements for NorthWind using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]). Discover the NorthWind Denver recovery context (eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context) detailing Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz relocation risks. Note: Julian's own logged call about Emilia Cruz's piano damage (crm_engagement_0d8a9121b53c, showing "No owner assigned during call log entry") has empty company_ids and may require broader CRM exploration or discovery via email/Slack references to locate.
8. Search Airtable for relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "BrightLoop Analytics" or "NorthWind Technologies" or "Terraform Digital" or similar). Discover BrightLoop records for Simone Richter and Marcus Webb (still "In Progress" with no updates reflecting the unresolved apartment and car issues), confirm that no Terraform relocation records exist for Priya Dasgupta, Samantha Obi, or Marcus Liu (they are not tracking in the system despite May 5 being imminent), and find NorthWind records for Emilia Cruz.
9. Search Linear for tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "BrightLoop" or "NorthWind" or "Emilia" or "Terraform" or "StormCloud" or similar). Discover BrightLoop audit ticket (linear_issue_c16357d188c6, #412) with comments detailing Blessing's missed Road Runner notice and capacity concerns, NorthWind retention ticket (linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1, #482) triggered by Pam's escalation, StormCloud reconstruction ticket (linear_issue_a49b4d199139, #284) with cross-functional findings including the $500 credit misapplication and Ridgeline referral drop, and the Jae-won lease follow-up (linear_issue_e7bcaf6978f0, #412) showing Omar's low-priority triage based on incorrect Airtable status.
10. Search QuickBooks for StormCloud billing using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria referencing StormCloud or similar). Discover StormCloud invoice INV-2026-002 (inv_stormcloud_01) and confirm the $500 goodwill credit does not appear on it. The specific misapplication detail (credit posted to cancelled estimate EST-2026-0287 instead of active invoice INV-2026-0319) is discovered via email (Marcus Thorne's email_email_ed395722f1d4) and Slack/Linear, not directly in QuickBooks records.
11. Look up contacts for affected employees using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Emilia Cruz" or similar) and crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Simone Richter" or "Marcus Webb" or similar), or locate their email addresses from prior email thread discoveries. Find email addresses for sending updates: simone.richter@brightloopanalytics.com (via CRM or email threads; note: contacts_search_contacts returns a different Simone Richter at StormCloud), marcus.webb@brightloopanalytics.com (via contacts_search_contacts contact_id: contacts_contact_6921464373bd or CRM), emilia.cruz@northwindtech.com (via contacts_search_contacts contact_id: contacts_contact_489b4b66f93f).
12. Send update email to Emilia Cruz using send_email (sender: "julian.brooks@moveops.com", recipients: ["emilia.cruz@northwindtech.com"]). Acknowledge the piano damage complaint and provide a status update. She has been waiting 14 days for a callback with no owner ever assigned.
13. Send update email to Simone Richter using send_email (sender: "julian.brooks@moveops.com", recipients: ["simone.richter@brightloopanalytics.com"]). Provide status on the apartment correction. She has been in the wrong unit (studio instead of 1BR) for weeks with no confirmed resolution from UrbanNest.
14. Send update email to Marcus Webb using send_email (sender: "julian.brooks@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.webb@brightloopanalytics.com"]). Provide status on the car delivery. Road Runner has not confirmed delivery of his 2019 Honda Civic past the revised April 18-20 window.
15. Post summary in the #customer-support channel using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C007", payload: summary message, user_id: "moveops_julian_brooks") covering all open threads across BrightLoop, NorthWind, Terraform, and StormCloud so Julian has everything in one place.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
